left_required_property: Open normal exits are rejected and no automatic action exists.
right_required_property: Open normal exits run one compiler-derived total repair.
collapse_rule: Rejecting all open exits collapses repair to atomic; adding cleanup to atomic collapses it to repair.

left_required_property: Lexical open exits are rejected; authority never becomes first class.
right_required_property: A first-class exact value may cross helpers but must be consumed exactly once.
collapse_rule: An exact token confined lexically collapses to atomic; a lexical authority passed as exact collapses to linear.

left_required_property: Partial state is lexical and cannot survive an exit.
right_required_property: Affine partition is always structurally droppable and may survive/escape as one master owner.
collapse_rule: A nonescaping partition with rejected abandonment collapses to atomic.

left_required_property: No runtime partial-state tag or persistent partial owner exists.
right_required_property: A sealed Dense/Hole runtime descriptor makes partial state droppable.
collapse_rule: Removing the runtime descriptor and rejecting open exits collapses topology to atomic.

left_required_property: Normal exit runs a compiler-derived repair/destruction action selected by partial state.
right_required_property: Normal exit directly drops already-valid proved ranges without repairing Dense.
collapse_rule: A partition cleanup that reconstructs Dense collapses to repair.

left_required_property: Compiler emits an exact repair block and no runtime partial descriptor is required.
right_required_property: Validated runtime metadata directly selects structural drop ranges; no repair block exists.
collapse_rule: A topology exit that runs hidden repair-to-Dense collapses to repair.

left_required_property: Every normal edge consumes the exact value; no implicit action.
right_required_property: Affine abandonment is accepted through derived repair.
collapse_rule: Adding cleanup to exact-use or rejecting repair exits collapses the distinction.

right_required_property: Abandonment structurally drops proved ranges and releases once.
collapse_rule: Giving partition exact-use/no drop collapses to linear.

left_required_property: Exact flow proof carries all ownership state and emits no runtime topology.
right_required_property: Runtime Dense/Hole metadata selects live ranges for structural drop.
collapse_rule: Making topology fully proof-erased and exact-use collapses to linear.

left_required_property: Zero-to-two ranges are statically proved and no tag selects them.
right_required_property: Dense/Hole and range endpoints are runtime sealed metadata.
collapse_rule: A proof arm with runtime topology collapses to runtime; a runtime arm whose descriptor erases collapses to proof.
